topicData.content: Hallo! Es freut mich sehr, Sie kennenzulernen. Ich hoffe, wir können heute interessante Gespräche führen.
topicData.author: user2

topicData.content: Bonjour ! Ravi de faire votre connaissance. J’espère que nous passerons un moment agréable ensemble.
topicData.author: user2

topicData.content: Oi! É um prazer conhecê-lo(a). Espero que possamos ter uma conversa agradável hoje.
topicData.author: user1

topicData.content: Hello! It's a pleasure to meet you. I’m looking forward to sharing ideas and learning from each other today.
topicData.author: user1

topicData.content: 안녕하세요. 만나 뵙게 되어 정말 반갑습니다. 오늘 좋은 시간 보내길 바랍니다.
topicData.author: user1

topicData.content: こんにちは。お会いできて光栄です。今日はいろいろお話しできると嬉しいです。
topicData.author: user1

topicData.content: 你好！很高兴在这里遇到你，希望今天能有愉快的交流。
topicData.author: user1
